label: Data Security / DLP Engineer
description: Implements and manages data security controls — data classification, DLP policy, data governance frameworks, insider threat monitoring, and information protection technologies.

paths.name: Microsoft Purview Track
paths.rationale: Microsoft Purview is the dominant enterprise data security and DLP platform. SC-401 is the primary Microsoft credential for information protection administrators.
pros: SC-401 directly applicable in Microsoft 365 environments
CDPSE adds ISACA data privacy engineering credential alongside technical skills
High demand at organizations running M365

cert_sequence.notes: Microsoft Information Security Administrator Associate (SC-401, successor to SC-400) — Microsoft Purview data classification, DLP policies, sensitivity labels, insider risk management, and information barriers. Use Microsoft Learn free SC-401 path. Hands-on practice in a Microsoft 365 developer tenant is essential.

ISACA Certified Data Privacy Solutions Engineer — data privacy governance, privacy architecture, and data lifecycle management from an engineering perspective. Complements SC-401 Microsoft-specific knowledge with vendor-neutral governance framework. The most technically-oriented privacy credential available.

DAMA Certified Data Management Professional — data governance and data management framework knowledge. Data quality, metadata management, and data lifecycle chapters are directly relevant to data security program design. Recognized by data governance teams as the professional body credential for data management practitioners.
